source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two loudspeakers, \( A \) and \( B \) (\textbf{figure}), are driven by the same amplifier and emit sinusoidal waves in phase. Consider point \( Q \) along the extension of the line connecting the speakers, \( 1.00\,\text{m} \) to the right of speaker \( B \). Both speakers emit sound waves that travel directly from the speaker to point \( Q \). What is the lowest frequency for which \textit{destructive} interference occurs at point \( Q \)?
